messages.content: paraphrase this: Any update for this ticket?
Has there been any progress on this ticket?
paraphrase this: Any update for this?
Is there any new information on this?
paraphrase this: Please specify if this printer is for office use or the small printer that prints small receipts?
Could you clarify whether this printer is intended for office use or is it the smaller type that prints receipts?
paraphrase this: Can you attach a picture of the printer?
Could you provide a photo of the printer?
Paraphrase this: Kindly return the laptop, so that we could sign your clearance. Thank you.
Please return the laptop to enable us to process your clearance. Thank you.
paraphrase this: Cyan cartridge has been replaced on Canon printer.
The cyan ink cartridge in the Canon printer has been changed.
paraphrase this: I'd like to ask if Oscar has returned the laptop/PC provided by Milestone?
Could you inform me whether Oscar has brought back the laptop/PC issued by Milestone?
paraphrase respectfully: I'd like to ask if Oscar has returned the laptop/PC provided by Milestone?
May I inquire whether Oscar has returned the laptop/PC that was provided by Milestone?
paraphrase this: Please check if the issue has been resolved? There was problem in remote session.
Could you verify whether the issue has been fixed? There was a problem during the remote session.
paraphrase this: Alright Saeed, you can come to our office to give us the laptop after Eid, thank you
Okay Saeed, you're welcome to bring the laptop to our office after Eid, thank you.
paraphrase this: I have contacted Saeed and he said he will give the laptop after Eid as he's now outside Riyadh.
I've reached out to Saeed, and he has informed me that he will return the laptop after Eid since he is currently away from Riyadh.
